atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain began approximately six days ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is a spasm

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain occurred suddenly during walks

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain persisted despite ibuprofen and heat application

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports she has been lifting more recently

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports she has been lifting approximately three times per week

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports she speculates it may have been related to a deadlift performed that day

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies reported trauma

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or weakness in her lower extremities

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals mild tenderness to palpation on the right lateral aspect of the lumbar spine

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals pain reproduced with flexion and extension

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Straight leg raise is negative

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The heart exam reveals a systolic ejection murmur, grade 2/6, which is stable

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports lumbar strain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam 15 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs to apply ice and heat.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes lisinopril 10 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a refill of lisinopril.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in four weeks.
